adrs.title: Canonical registry is a single JSON document
Entity-centric registry with a derived graph export
Claim status and claim tier are orthogonal
Feature implementation state is separate from lifecycle state
Portable SSOT core with repo-specific evidence adapters
Enforce max path and filename lengths under `.ssot`
Profiles are reusable feature bundles with derived pass status
Downstream assurance-language ceilings for feature target claim tiers
Feature implementation is capped by active required claims

features.description: Frozen NPM 2.10.4 and 2.15.1 wire-compatible API profiles.
features.title: Versioned NPM API compatibility

features.description: Zero-change npmctl doctor, schema, reconciliation, adoption, drift, and audit workflows.
features.title: npmctl compatibility

features.description: Users, admins, passwords, disablement, section permissions, and visibility.
features.title: Users and RBAC

features.description: JWT login and refresh, TOTP challenge, backup codes, and compatible impersonation.
features.title: Authentication and 2FA

features.description: Scoped, expiring, revocable personal and service tokens with one-time reveal.
features.title: Native access tokens

features.description: HTTP and HTTPS proxy hosts with TLS, WebSockets, caching, locations, and advanced configuration.
features.title: Proxy hosts

features.description: NPM-compatible redirection and 404 host lifecycle.
features.title: Redirection and dead hosts

features.description: TCP and UDP stream routing including stream TLS behavior.
features.title: TCP and UDP streams

features.description: Basic-auth users, client allow and deny rules, and satisfy-any behavior.
features.title: Proxy access lists

features.description: Certificate upload, validation, secure storage, assignment, import, and expiry.
features.title: Custom certificates

features.description: HTTP-01 and DNS-01 issuance, scheduling, renewal, failure recovery, and expiry.
features.title: ACME certificate lifecycle

features.description: Complete frozen-profile DNS provider definitions and credential schemas.
features.title: DNS-01 provider catalog

features.description: Deterministic render, validation, atomic activation, reload, health, drift, and rollback.
features.title: Atomic Nginx reconciliation

features.description: Process-local disposable persistence adapter for tests and demos.
features.title: In-memory persistence

features.description: Default single-node durable SQLite adapter with backup and migration support.
features.title: SQLite persistence

features.description: NPM-parity MySQL and MariaDB durable persistence adapter.
features.title: MySQL and MariaDB persistence

features.description: Transactional PostgreSQL adapter with leases and HA control-plane support.
features.title: PostgreSQL persistence

features.description: Versioned checksummed single-writer filesystem-only metadata adapter.
features.title: Filesystem persistence

features.description: SQL canonical metadata with filesystem or object-backed blobs and secrets.
features.title: Hybrid persistence

features.description: Responsive permission-aware management console with complete operational states.
features.title: Operator UI

features.description: Compatible settings and audit plus native reports and component health.
features.title: Settings, audit, reporting, and health

features.description: Dry-run import, ID and metadata preservation, certificate transfer, cutover, and rollback.
features.title: NPM migration and cutover

features.description: Multi-architecture images, Compose modes, SBOM, provenance, signatures, and recovery.
features.title: OCI distribution

features.description: Profile-scoped OpenAPI, middleware, status, error, coercion, and security-header behavior.
features.title: Compatibility API transport

features.description: Global includes, default site, IPv6, resolver, trusted ranges, and offline-safe startup.
features.title: Nginx platform controls

features.description: Stable per-object traffic logs, retention, compression, reopen, and diagnostics.
features.title: Traffic logs and rotation

features.description: Forward-only startup migrations, semantic versions, upgrade diagnostics, backup gate, and rollback contract.
features.title: Runtime upgrades and version policy

features.description: Process supervision, root and UID/GID modes, rootless diagnostics, ports, volumes, and signals.
features.title: Container runtime identity

features.description: Installed JSON CLI for setup, login, status, schema, and compatible resource CRUD without npm.
features.title: Operator CLI

features.description: Client-certificate authentication and upstream client-certificate presentation beyond the frozen NPM parity boundary.
features.title: Mutual TLS

features.description: QUIC transport and HTTP/3 routing requiring an explicit data-plane expansion.
features.title: HTTP/3 and QUIC data plane

features.description: Versioned durable per-user preferences beyond baseline profile, password, theme, accessibility, and locale settings.
features.title: Advanced durable user preferences

features.description: Native WebTransport termination and proxying, intentionally unsupported by the selected Nginx data plane.

lifecycle.note: Won't do for the current product boundary and Nginx data-plane architecture; WebTransport is not a WebSocket compatibility mode.

features.title: WebTransport
